# Pivotal Tides — llms.txt
# https://pivotaltides.com

## About

Pivotal Tides is a private psychotherapy practice owned and operated by Angelique Danza, M.S., LMFT (CA LMFT112463). The practice is based in Temecula, CA, in the Inland Empire of Southern California, and offers depth-oriented, insight-focused therapy for individuals, couples, groups, and reproductive mental health support.

## Clinician

- Name: Angelique Danza
- Credentials: M.S., Licensed Marriage and Family Therapist
- License: CA LMFT112463, Board of Behavioral Sciences
- Certifications: Certified Women's Mental Health & Reproductive Mental Health Specialist, Certified in Narcissistic Abuse Treatment, Certified in Anger Management
- Affiliations: California Association of Marriage and Family Therapists (CAMFT), American Society for Reproductive Medicine (ASRM)
- Experience: 10+ years providing psychotherapy to children, adolescents, adults, couples, and groups

## Services

- Individual Therapy — $175 per 50-minute session
- Couples Therapy — $200 per 50-minute session
- Group Therapy — contact for current offerings
- Reproductive Support: Intended Parent (IP) & Gestational Carrier/Surrogate Psychological Assessments — contact for information

## Modalities

Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT), Client-Centered Therapy (CCT), Mindfulness-Based approaches, depth-oriented and insight-focused work

## Specialties

Women's issues, infertility, grief & loss, cancer psychotherapy, life transitions, relationship issues, anger management, family conflict, infidelity, marital & premarital, narcissistic abuse recovery, self-esteem, stress & burnout, identity & purpose, anxiety & depression, reproductive support, intended parent (IP) support, surrogate & gestational carrier support

## Insurance

Aetna, Anthem Blue Cross, Carelon, Cigna/Evernorth, out-of-network benefits

## Location & Service Area

Temecula, CA 92590
Serving: Murrieta, Temecula, and the broader Inland Empire
In-person and virtual sessions available

## Contact

Phone: (951) 395-6089
Website: https://pivotaltides.com
Free 15-minute consultation available
